Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Federal-Provincial Fiscal Arrangements Act (Canada Health Transfer)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Federal-Provincial Fiscal Arrangements Act (Canada Health Transfer)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Federal-Provincial Fiscal Arrangements Act respecting the cash contribution of the Canada Health Transfer for each fiscal year beginning after March 31, 2017.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The portion of subparagraph 24.1(1)(a)(v) of the Federal-Provincial Fiscal Arrangements Act before the formula is replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (v)
Subparagraph.Text: for each fiscal year beginning after March 31, 2017, the product, rounded to the nearest thousand, obtained by multiplying the cash contribution for the immediately preceding fiscal year by the greater of 1.06, and
